contactHero.title: Let’s Build Smarter Digital Solutions Together
contactHero.subtitle: From software development and digital marketing to Starlink installation and security systems, Tora Tech helps businesses across Cameroon and beyond grow with modern technology.

contactForm.title: Send Us a Message
contactForm.subtitle: Tell us about your project or business needs and our team will get back to you quickly.

whatsapp.title: Need a Faster Response?
whatsapp.subtitle: Chat directly with our team on WhatsApp for quick assistance and consultations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What services does Tora Tech provide?
faq.a1: We provide software development, website management, SEO optimization, digital marketing, Starlink installation, training programs, and security camera installation services.
faq.q2: Do you work with international clients?
faq.a2: Yes. Tora Tech works with businesses and entrepreneurs across Cameroon, Africa, and international markets.
faq.q3: Can I request a custom software solution?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We design custom digital solutions tailored to your business goals and operational needs.
faq.q4: Do you offer training programs for beginners?
faq.a4: Yes. We provide beginner-friendly and professional training programs in software development and digital marketing.

footer.description: Tora Tech empowers businesses through modern technology solutions including software development, digital marketing, Starlink installation, SEO optimization, and security systems.
footer.newsletterSubtitle: Get updates on technology trends, services, and digital growth strategies.
